==Thorny Skin==
Most low-level predators are sometimes also victims, so it makes sense for them to grow spiked skin.

{{Organ Tabber
|Name=Thorny Skin
|Rarity=green
|ID Number=2
|Initial HP=0
|HP Increase=0
|Initial ATK=2
|ATK Increase=0
|Initial DEF=1
|DEF Increase=0
|Initial RUSH=0
|RUSH Increase=0
|Effect 1=When exploring, DMG Reflection +30
|Initial Effect Value 1=
|Effect Value Increase 1=
|Effect 2=
|Initial Effect Value 2=
|Effect Value Increase 2=
|Effect 3=
|Initial Effect Value 3=
|Effect Value Increase 3=
|Effect 4=
|Initial Effect Value 4=
|Effect Value Increase 4=
|}}

==Source==
Starting Evolution

[[Category:Organs]]
[[Category:Green Organs]]
__NOTOC__
